settings.title: Ledgerworks Now Offers Real-Time Cloud Bookkeeping
settings.excerpt: Clients can now see their numbers update through the month instead of waiting for a quarterly report.
settings.body:
For a long time, small business owners only saw a true picture of their finances after the quarter closed. By then the information was useful for history but not for decisions.

Our new cloud bookkeeping service changes that. We connect to your bank feed and keep your accounts reconciled through the month, so you can log in any day and see where you stand.

How it works in practice

Once your bank feed is linked, transactions flow through automatically and we keep them tidied and categorised as the month goes. There is no shoebox of receipts to hand over at the end and no long wait while everything is sorted at once. The picture you see is current, not a snapshot from weeks ago.

Day to day, the service gives you a few things.

  • Accounts kept reconciled throughout the month, not just at quarter end
  • A clear view of cash you can check any day
  • A short monthly call to talk through the figures

Who it is built for

The service includes a short monthly call to talk through what the numbers are telling you. It is built for owners who want to make decisions on current information, not last quarter's.

It suits a business that is moving quickly enough that timing matters, where the choice to take on a hire, raise a price, or wait a month should rest on this week's reality rather than a report that has already gone stale.
